query:
SELECT 
  t.id, t.title, t.dueDate, t.repeatInterval, t.repeatUnit, t.enableRotation,
  ron.occurrenceNumber, ron.isSkipped, ron.isSpecial, ron.specialDate, ron.notes
FROM tasks t
LEFT JOIN task_rotation_occurrence_notes ron ON t.id = ron.taskId
WHERE t.dueDate IS NOT NULL AND t.repeatInterval IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.id, ron.occurrenceNumber
LIMIT 50;
